fields.label: REST URL
fields.helpText: From Upstash Console -> Database -> Details -> REST API -> URL

fields.label: REST Token
fields.helpText: From Upstash Console -> Database -> Details -> REST API -> Token

healthcheck_config.description: Validates REST token via Upstash Redis PING command

metadata.summary: Upstash serverless Redis and Kafka for low-latency data at the edge.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to console.upstash.com
2. Select your Redis database (or create one)
3. Go to Details -> REST API section
4. Copy the REST URL and REST Token
5. Paste both values here
